statements.sql: INSERT INTO silver.WhileLoopTarget (ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName) SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)), ProductName FROM bronze.Product ORDER BY ProductID OFFSET @Offset ROWS FETCH NEXT @BatchSize ROWS ONLY

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, ProductName AS EnglishProductName FROM [bronze].[Product] ORDER BY ProductID
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH source_product AS ( SELECT * FROM [bronze].[Product] ), transformed_product AS ( SELECT CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25)) AS ProductAlternateKey, ProductName AS EnglishProductName FROM source_product ), final AS ( SELECT ProductAlternateKey, EnglishProductName FROM transformed_product ORDER BY ProductAlternateKey ) SELECT * FROM final
